explanation: The property states that it is globally true that if the system is being operated by a healthcare professional, then the action of erasing the alarm system log must not occur. This ensures that the log contents are never erased by a healthcare professional operator.

The property states that globally, it must always be the case that if a healthcare professional is operating the system (user_equalTo_operator), then it is always true that they are not erasing the contents of the alarm system log (eraseLog). This directly captures the 'shall not permit' requirement, ensuring that the forbidden action never occurs when the specified condition is met.

The property states that globally (G), it is always true that it is not the case that the healthcare professional operator (user_equalTo_operator) erases the contents of the alarm system log (eraseLog). This directly captures the 'shall not permit' requirement for the specified action and actor.

The property states that it is always (G) true that it is not (!) the case that the healthcare professional operator (user_equalTo_operator) erases the contents of the alarm system log (eraseLog). This directly captures the requirement that the system shall not permit this action.

The property states that it is globally true that if the healthcare professional operator is operating the system, then the erasure of the alarm system log contents is not permitted. This directly captures the "shall not permit" requirement by ensuring that the eraseLog action is always false when the user is an operator.

The property states that globally (G), if 'user_equalTo_operator' is true (indicating a healthcare professional operator is using the system), then it must always be the case that 'eraseLog' is false (meaning they are not permitted to erase the alarm system log). This directly captures the requirement that the system 'shall not permit' this action by that specific user type.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is being operated by a healthcare professional (user_equalTo_operator), then it must always be the case that the contents of the alarm system log are not erased (!eraseLog). This directly captures the requirement that the system shall not permit the healthcare professional operator to erase the log.

The property states that globally, it must always be true that if the system is being operated by a healthcare professional, then the action of erasing the alarm system log is not occurring. This directly translates "The system shall not permit the healthcare professional operator to erase the contents of the alarm system log." by ensuring that the eraseLog event never happens while the user is an operator.

The property states that it should globally (G) never be the case that the 'healthcare professional operator' (user_equalTo_operator) is operating AND the 'erasure of the alarm system log' (eraseLog) occurs. This directly captures the requirement that the system shall not permit this action by the specified user.

The property states that it is globally (G) always true that it is NOT (!) the case that the healthcare professional operator (user_equalTo_operator) is erasing the contents of the alarm system log (eraseLog) at the same time. This ensures that the action of erasing the log by a healthcare professional is never permitted.
